description: A reader should fail sync when the seed answers an advertised root WANT with a different root revision OBJECT that was never requested.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the unexpected root revision OBJECT because the seed returned a different root than the one the accepted sync roots advertised and the reader requested.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unexpected root OBJECT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with an advertised-root/root-set violation on the OBJECT path, not just WANT reachability.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness swaps the first root revision OBJECT for an unrequested alternative.
